heading: Determination of student aid index
label: 1087nn Determination of student aid index
notes: Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to determination of expected family contribution and the data elements to be considered.Pub. L. 116–2601998—Subsec. (b)(3). inserted “, excluding the student’s parents,” after “family of the student”.Pub. L. 105–2441992— substituted “Determination of expected family contribution; data elements” for “Data elements used in determining expected family contribution” in section catchline and amended text generally, adding subsec. (a), designating existing provisions as subsec. (b) and inserting heading, adding the age of the older parent, in the case of a dependent student, and the student as a data element and striking out consideration of any unusual medical and dental expenses and consideration of the number of dependent children other than the student enrolled in a private elementary or secondary institution and the unreimbursed tuition paid as data elements.Pub. L. 102–3251988—Par. (8). substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”, which for purposes of codification was translated as “title 26” thus requiring no change in text.Pub. L. 100–369

Effective Date of 2020 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except as otherwise expressly provided, and applicable with respect to award year 2024–2025 and each subsequent award year, as determined under this chapter, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 116–260section 701(b) of Pub. L. 116–260section 1001 of this titleJuly 1, 2024

Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by , effective , and applicable with respect to determinations of need under this part for academic years beginning on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–244section 480A of Pub. L. 105–244section 1087kk of this titleOct. 7, 1998July 1, 2000

Effective Date of 1992 AmendmentAmendment by applicable with respect to determinations of need under this part for award years beginning on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–325section 471(b) of Pub. L. 102–325section 1087kk of this titleJuly 1, 1993
